prompt: 一幅令人叹为观止、极其复杂的「{argument name="主题" default="儒释道根本区别"}」概念世界构建信息图杰作，整体被设计成一部底蕴深厚的东方古典神话传说手稿。背景：纯白色复古纹理画布，浅米黄做旧牛皮纸底色，轻微毛边与水渍感。核心布局：中心视觉采用宏大的「竖版蛋形分层结构」，从上到下依次为释、道、儒三层。边缘边角料：四个角落点缀精细微观插图，主题为古代观测手记、法器与符文。色彩：低饱和鼠尾草绿、浅金、米白为主色调，整体清淡柔和，无刺眼高饱和色彩。细节：建筑线条、山水皴法、莲花纹路、云气层次清晰可见，纤毫毕现。无缝融合：三层之间通过云雾与水流自然过渡，释的佛光、道的太极云气、儒的书卷气息无缝衔接。风格：{argument name="艺术风格" default="古典墨水线稿+低饱和数字水彩"}，清淡国风古籍手稿质感。文字标注：纯正繁体汉字，采用斑驳古风宋体，每个标注含短标题+一行诗意描述，由暗金色发丝引线连接对应细节，无重复指向。画幅比例：3:4竖版独立完整标题区（顶部）：`儒釋道·根本區別`中心分层标注：顶层「釋」：`釋`，`人與自己的關係`，`無我·治心·放得下`中层「道」：`道`，`人與萬物的關係`，`無為·治身·想得開`底层「儒」：`儒`，`人與人的關係`，`無己·治世·拿得起`左右辅助标注：左侧：`淨`，`清淨明心，斷除煩惱`；`靜`，`順應自然，回歸本心`；`敬`，`敬畏責任，積極入世`右侧：`60歲+修心`，`看淡得失，回歸內心`；`35-55歲做人`，`張弛有度，順應規律`；`7-35歲做事`，`銳意進取，建功立业`底部总结文字：`入世與出世之間的平衡，是高級的生活智慧`
translatedPrompt: A breathtaking and extremely complex conceptual world-building infographic masterpiece of the "{argument name="theme" default="fundamental differences between Confucianism, Taoism, and Buddhism"}", overall designed as an ancient Eastern classical mythological manuscript. Background: pure white retro textured canvas, light beige aged parchment base color, with slight frayed edges and water stain effects. Core layout: The central visual adopts a grand "vertical egg-shaped layered structure", with Buddhism, Taoism, and Confucianism layers from top to bottom. Edge details: four corners adorned with fine microscopic illustrations themed on ancient observation notes, ritual implements, and runes. Color: low-saturation sage green, light gold, and off-white as main tones, generally light and soft without piercing high-saturation colors. Details: architectural lines, landscape brushwork techniques, lotus patterns, and cloud layers are clearly visible and rendered with extreme detail. Seamless fusion: Natural transitions between the three layers via clouds and flowing water, seamlessly connecting Buddhist light, Taoist Taiji clouds, and Confucian scholarly atmosphere. Style: {argument name="art style" default="classical ink line art + low-saturation digital watercolor"}, with a light Chinese style ancient book manuscript texture. Text annotations: Pure traditional Chinese characters in a mottled ancient Song font, each annotation containing a short title + a line of poetic description, connected to details by dark gold hairline leads with no repetitive pointing. Aspect ratio: 3:4 vertical independent complete unit. Title Area (top): `Confucianism, Buddhism, Taoism: Fundamental Differences`. Central layered annotations: Top layer 'Buddhism': `Buddhism`, `Relationship between self and self`, `No-self, governing the heart, letting go`. Middle layer 'Taoism': `Taoism`, `Relationship between self and all things`, `Non-action, governing the body, keeping an open mind`. Bottom layer 'Confucianism': `Confucianism`, `Relationship between people`, `No-ego, governing the world, taking responsibility`. Side auxiliary annotations: Left: `Purity: clear heart and bright mind, severing afflictions`; `Stillness: following nature, returning to the original heart`; `Reverence: awe of responsibility, active engagement with the world`. Right: `60+ years refining the heart: looking past gains and losses, returning to the inner self`; `35-55 years being human: balance of tension and relaxation, following laws`; `7-35 years doing things: forging ahead with determination, building a career`. Bottom summary: `The balance between being in the world and being out of it is a high-level wisdom of life`.

breakdown.creativeCore: Philosophical Concept Infographic Manuscript：A highly detailed and complex prompt for an infographic designed as an ancient mythological manuscript, explaining the differences between Confucianism, Taoism, and Buddhism.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 知识卡片、科普图、社媒长图、教学材料

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: annotations, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: retro, watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
